description: Counterpart of the exam-style case agents-exam/agent-tutor-with-memory.json. Gold mirrors the exam case ({agent, false}): cross-session memory plus chat interaction should route to the agent-builder path, not a workflow build. Plan-first (2026-07-09): the assistant proposes the approach; the build is never exercised and expectations avoid build-tool coupling.

conversation.text: A tutor that helps me learn Python over multiple sessions, remembering what we covered. Don't build anything yet — first walk me through how you'd set this up.

text: [Do not approve any plan, setup card, or build confirmation.
If the assistant asks a clarifying question, give a minimal plausible answer.
Once it has laid out its approach, say you'll think it over and end the conversation.]

processExpectations: The agent proposes creating an n8n Agent — an ongoing conversational tutor with cross-session memory — rather than building a workflow.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before deciding what to propose.
